speaker: BRUTUS
text: Yet, countrymen, O, yet hold up your heads!

speaker: CATO
text: What bastard doth not? Who will go with me?

speaker: CATO
text: I will proclaim my name about the field.

speaker: CATO
text: I am the son of Marcus Cato, ho!

speaker: CATO
text: A foe to tyrants and my country’s friend.

speaker: CATO
text: I am the son of Marcus Cato, ho!

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: And I am Brutus, Marcus Brutus, I!

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: Brutus, my country’s friend! Know me for Brutus.

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: O young and noble Cato, art thou down?

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: Why, now thou diest as bravely as Titinius

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: And mayst be honored, being Cato’s son.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Yield, or thou diest.

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: Only I yield to die.

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: There is so much that thou wilt kill me straight.

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: Kill Brutus and be honored in his death.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: We must not. A noble prisoner!

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SOLDIER
text: Room, ho! Tell Antony Brutus is ta’en.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: I’ll tell the news. Here comes the General.—

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Brutus is ta’en, Brutus is ta’en, my lord.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Where is he?

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: Safe, Antony, Brutus is safe enough.

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: I dare assure thee that no enemy

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: Shall ever take alive the noble Brutus.

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: The gods defend him from so great a shame!

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: When you do find him, or alive or dead,

speaker: LUCILIUS
text: He will be found like Brutus, like himself.

speaker: ANTONY
text: This is not Brutus, friend, but I assure you,

speaker: ANTONY
text: A prize no less in worth. Keep this man safe.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Give him all kindness. I had rather have

speaker: ANTONY
text: Such men my friends than enemies. Go on,

speaker: ANTONY
text: And see whe’er Brutus be alive or dead,

speaker: ANTONY
text: And bring us word unto Octavius’ tent

speaker: ANTONY
text: How everything is chanced.
